Shoal Signal | Agents will Run their Own Business - Inside Laso, Agent Payment Cards, and Agent Commerce with Hunter, Founder at Laso Finance
> In this episode, we cover how Laso gives agents their own one-time-use cards to spend anywhere with no KYC, why self-sovereign spending is the through-line, where x402, Locus & Policy stack fit.
> Why the real prize is agents starting their own businesses rather than shopping for you, and the AGI risk that could make frictionless agent payments unnecessary.
👇

“Tokens with Equity Do Not Work”
> “Nothing on a five-year time horizon is up. Most of the stuff is down 90, 95%. Even the best tokens that have an equity structure that have been around for a long time..They're flat..And the reason that they're flat is because there's this imbalance”
> “Everything about the token from the airdrop to what you need to do to incentivize distribution partners at cexes or custodians, it's all sell pressure. And if you don't have the buy pressure of investors buying the token to offset it, it doesn't work and it's down only.”
Source:
https://x.com/MikeIppolito_/status/2072359589798895986?s=20
